idea-plugin.name: SAP Commerce Test Helper
idea-plugin.description:
Helps to run SAP Commerce (Hybris) Integration tests in IntelliJ.

Prerequisite

Pre-created modules using the SAP Commerce Development Toolset Plugin.

Automatically configures the required classpath to let integration tests run directly from IntelliJ.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
Initial release.

Features:
  • Run SAP Commerce tests from extension modules
  • Automatic classpath resolution
  • Automatic JVM configuration
